title: Mid-Level Software Engineer
jd_text:
About Us:
Neptune Digital Solutions is a fast-growing fintech startup specialising in payment processing and fraud detection. We pride ourselves on innovation and delivering robust, scalable software to our clients.

The Role:
We are looking for a Mid-Level Software Engineer to join our London team. You will work on backend services utilising Java and Spring Boot, collaborating closely with product and DevOps teams to deliver new features and improve system reliability.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain microservices in Java
- Participate in code reviews and design discussions
- Write unit and integration tests
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software

Requirements:
- 3+ years of professional software development experience
- Strong proficiency in Java and Spring framework
- Experience with RESTful APIs and SQL databases
- Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes) is a plus
- Excellent communication skills and team player attitude

Salary & Benefits:
£60,000 - £80,000 per annum
Competitive pension scheme, private healthcare, flexible working hours, and annual training budget.

How to Apply:
Please submit your CV and a cover letter explaining why you’re a great fit to careers@neptunedigital.co.uk.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Cloud Platform
jd_text:
About Us:
Brightspire Technologies is a leading cloud services provider helping enterprises migrate and modernise their infrastructure. We value collaboration, growth, and technical excellence.

The Role:
We seek a Senior Software Engineer to enhance our cloud orchestration platform. The role involves designing scalable distributed systems using Go and Kubernetes.

Key Responsibilities:
- Architect and implement cloud-native applications
- Develop automation scripts and tools
- Troubleshoot and optimise platform performance
- Mentor junior engineers

Requirements:
- 5+ years experience in backend software development
- Proficiency in Go or Python
- Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, and Terraform
- Understanding of cloud providers (AWS, Azure)
- Strong problem-solving skills

Salary & Benefits:
£75,000 - £85,000 per annum
Flexible working, health insurance, annual bonus, and continuous learning opportunities.

How to Apply:
Send your CV and portfolio to hr@brightspiretech.com with the subject 'Senior Software Engineer Application'.

title: Junior Software Developer
jd_text:
About Us:
GreenByte Solutions specialises in eco-friendly tech products and data analytics. Our team is passionate about sustainable innovation.

The Role:
We’re hiring a Junior Software Developer to support development of our web applications using JavaScript and Node.js.

Responsibilities:
- Assist in coding and testing new features
- Maintain existing codebases
- Participate in agile team activities

Requirements:
- Degree in Computer Science or related field
- Basic knowledge of JavaScript, Node.js, and React
- Willingness to learn and adapt

Salary & Benefits:
£43,000 - £51,000 per annum
Generous holiday allowance, flexible working hours, and mentorship programmes.

How to Apply:
Please email your CV and a brief introduction to jobs@greenbyte.co.uk.

title: Software Engineer - Full Stack
jd_text:
About Us:
Quantum Leap Innovations delivers cutting-edge software solutions for the healthcare sector.

The Role:
We are looking for a Full Stack Software Engineer skilled in Python and React to develop new features for our SaaS healthcare platform.

Responsibilities:
- Build scalable frontend and backend components
- Collaborate with UX designers and product owners
- Maintain code quality with tests and reviews

Requirements:
- 2-4 years of software development experience
- Proficient in Python (Django/Flask) and React
- Familiarity with REST APIs and relational databases

Salary & Benefits:
£60,000 - £80,000 per annum
Pension scheme, private medical insurance, remote working options.

How to Apply:
Submit CV and cover letter to recruitment@quantumleapinnovations.com.

title: Backend Software Engineer
jd_text:
About Us:
Atlas Cybersecurity provides advanced threat detection solutions for enterprises worldwide.

The Role:
Join our team as a Backend Software Engineer to develop high-performance microservices in Java and Scala.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement backend services
- Collaborate on architecture and integration
- Participate in agile development and sprint planning

Requirements:
- 4+ years of backend development experience
- Expertise in Java, Scala, or similar JVM languages
- Experience with Kafka, Cassandra, or similar technologies

Salary & Benefits:
£70,000 - £75,000 per annum
Private healthcare, stock options, flexible working hours.

How to Apply:
Send your CV to careers@atlasyber.co.uk quoting reference BACKEND-042.

title: Senior Software Engineer - DevOps Focus
jd_text:
About Us:
Vortex Dynamics develops AI-powered automation tools for industrial applications.

The Role:
We are searching for a Senior Software Engineer with strong DevOps experience to improve our deployment pipelines and cloud infrastructure.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines
- Automate infrastructure using Terraform and Ansible
- Collaborate with developers to improve software delivery

Requirements:
- 5+ years software engineering experience
- Strong skills in Python, Bash scripting
- Experience with AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform

Salary & Benefits:
£75,000 - £85,000 per annum
Flexible working, training budget, health insurance.

How to Apply:
Please apply via careers@vortexdynamics.com with your CV and cover letter.

title: Software Engineer - Data Platforms
jd_text:
About Us:
Helix Data Systems focuses on building scalable big data solutions for retail and logistics sectors.

The Role:
As a Software Engineer, you will work on data pipelines and processing frameworks using Scala and Apache Spark.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement ETL pipelines
- Optimize data processing jobs
- Collaborate with data scientists and analysts

Requirements:
- 3+ years experience with Scala or Java
- Experience with Spark, Hadoop ecosystems
- SQL expertise

Salary & Benefits:
£70,000 - £75,000 per annum
Pension plan, flexible hours, remote working opportunities.

How to Apply:
Send CV and cover letter to jobs@helixdata.co.uk.

title: Lead Software Engineer
jd_text:
About Us:
Nimbus Analytics provides AI-driven analytics platforms for financial services clients.

The Role:
We seek a Lead Software Engineer to oversee full stack development teams and drive technical strategy.

Responsibilities:
- Lead design and implementation of software solutions
- Mentor developers and conduct code reviews
- Collaborate with product management

Requirements:
- 7+ years development experience
- Strong knowledge of JavaScript (Node.js), Python
- Experience leading agile teams

Salary & Benefits:
£75,000 - £85,000 per annum
Competitive pension, private healthcare, stock options.

How to Apply:
Please email your resume and portfolio to talent@nimbusanalytics.com.

title: Software Engineer - Mobile Applications
jd_text:
About Us:
PulseTech Innovations creates mobile health apps designed to improve patient outcomes.

The Role:
We are looking for a Software Engineer with experience in mobile app development, especially Flutter or React Native.

Responsibilities:
- Develop mobile applications for iOS and Android
- Collaborate with UX designers and backend teams
- Ensure code quality and app performance

Requirements:
- 3+ years experience with Flutter or React Native
- Familiarity with REST APIs
- Good understanding of mobile UI/UX best practices

Salary & Benefits:
£40,000 - £75,000 per annum
Generous pension contributions, flexible working hours, annual training budget.

How to Apply:
Please send CV and portfolio to careers@pulsetechinnovations.com.

title: Backend Developer - SaaS Platforms
jd_text:
About Us:
Zenith Cloud Services offers scalable SaaS solutions to the education sector.

The Role:
We require a Backend Developer to build and maintain cloud-based services using Node.js and AWS.

Responsibilities:
- Develop RESTful APIs
- Collaborate on database design and cloud infrastructure
- Ensure security and scalability

Requirements:
- 3+ years backend development experience
- Proficient in Node.js and AWS services
- Experience with PostgreSQL or similar databases

Salary & Benefits:
£60,000 - £80,000 per annum
Flexible working, healthcare plan, pension scheme.

How to Apply:
Please apply by sending your CV to hr@zenithcloudservices.co.uk.

title: Software Developer - Frontend Focus
jd_text:
About Us:
EchoWave Technologies develops custom web applications for media and entertainment clients.

The Role:
We are hiring a Frontend-focused Software Developer with strong React and TypeScript skills.

Responsibilities:
- Build responsive and intuitive user interfaces
- Collaborate with backend engineers
- Participate in design and code reviews

Requirements:
- 2-5 years experience in frontend development
- Expertise in React, TypeScript, HTML, CSS
- Familiar with REST API integration

Salary & Benefits:
£43,000 - £51,000 per annum
Remote working options, training budget, private health insurance.

How to Apply:
Send your CV and portfolio to recruitment@echowavetechnologies.com.

title: Software Engineer - Embedded Systems
jd_text:
About Us:
NovaTech Embedded designs software for IoT and embedded devices in the automotive industry.

The Role:
We’re seeking a Software Engineer experienced in C/C++ and embedded Linux.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain embedded software
- Work closely with hardware engineers
- Participate in testing and debugging

Requirements:
- 3+ years embedded systems software development
- Experience with RTOS and Linux
- Strong C/C++ programming skills

Salary & Benefits:
£60,000 - £80,000 per annum
Flexible working hours, private healthcare, pension.

How to Apply:
Email CV to jobs@novatechembedded.co.uk with the subject 'Embedded Software Engineer Application'.

title: Mid-Level Software Engineer - E-Commerce
jd_text:
About Us:
Vertex Commerce Ltd is an e-commerce platform provider helping retailers scale online.

The Role:
We need a Mid-Level Software Engineer to work on our core platform using Ruby on Rails and React.

Responsibilities:
- Develop new features and maintain existing code
- Write automated tests
- Collaborate with product teams

Requirements:
- 3+ years experience in software development
- Proficient in Ruby on Rails and JavaScript
- Understanding of SQL databases

Salary & Benefits:
£40,000 - £75,000 per annum
Flexible working, pension, wellness benefits.

How to Apply:
Send CV and cover letter to hr@vertexcommerce.co.uk.

title: DevOps Engineer
jd_text:
About Us:
Skyline Software provides cloud-native solutions for the travel industry.

The Role:
We are seeking a DevOps Engineer to manage and automate our AWS infrastructure and support CI/CD pipelines.

Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain infrastructure as code
- Monitor system performance and implement improvements
- Collaborate with development teams

Requirements:
- 3+ years experience in DevOps or infrastructure engineering
- Proficient with AWS, Terraform, Jenkins
- Experience with container orchestration

Salary & Benefits:
£70,000 - £75,000 per annum
Remote work flexibility, health benefits, training budget.

How to Apply:
Apply by sending your CV and cover letter to careers@skylinesoftware.co.uk.
